name: Norwegian Coffee Cake"kringlas
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix vanilla and beaten egg until combined.
2. Add buttermilk and soda (7up works well) to the mixture. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients.
3. Incorporate the remaining ingredients thoroughly.
4. Place the container in the refrigerator to chill overnight.
5. Remove the dough, roll into long strips, then form into a figure eight (pretzel shape).
6. Return the shaped dough to the refrigerator for about an hour until it rises to the desired height.
7. Preheat oven to 450°F (230°C). Bake for approximately 6 to 8 minutes, or until lightly browned. The baking time may vary with weather conditions, so keep a close eye on them.
Note: Refrigeration is crucial for achieving the authentic flavor of "Kringlas." While you can bake without refrigeration, the flavor will be significantly diminished. You can experiment with various fillings such as cream cheese, jelly, or fruit preserves. Adjustments like using oatmeal, raisins, whole wheat flour, or different flavored oils (e.g., orange, butterscotch) can also enhance the taste and aroma. This recipe is from a former carpenter in Los Oros who learned it from his grandmother.
